core_payload.content:
# Sleep-Time Compute

## 1. Role
Sleep-Time Compute will become the mature off-peak execution fabric of N1Hub, aligning quiet-time workload routing with wallet posture, workload class, and human rhythm instead of treating off-hours compute as a generic dump queue.

## 2. Future Off-Peak Contract
The system will derive off-peak windows from timezone, profile, and learned rhythm; route mining, validation, planning, and refinement work through richer workload classes; and measure savings, usefulness, and next-day cognitive benefit as part of scheduling itself.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Invisible progress will stay valuable because it will remain bounded, economical, and supportive of the person rather than merely busy. Off-peak compute will become a controlled compounding engine instead of deferred background churn.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Sleep-Time Compute supports To Dig Deep by letting quiet time compound intelligence without stealing the human’s wakeful attention.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Sleep-Time Compute defines the future off-peak execution fabric of N1Hub: stronger quiet-window scheduling, wallet-aware routing, richer workload classes, and tighter coordination between human rhythm, control-plane policy, and cheap background compute.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
